.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title-content::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(0, 41, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(19, 26, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--folder-filter: invert(52%) sepia(95%) saturate(856%) hue-rotate(67deg) brightness(118%) contrast(117%)
body.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(19, 26, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(0, 224, 119) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(20, 23, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(0, 173, 101) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(19, 26, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(19, 26, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
